name: wifi-torn-session
note: The real Wi-Fi failure mode from the lab: a Heartbeat(SleepyTime) drop freezes the transfer at '2% (23.2 MB/938.6 MB)' — idevicebackup2 prints NO error, it hangs on the dead transport with zero further output and zero tree churn. The engine's activity-sampler liveness timeout catches the frozen tree and kills the process group → connection_lost. exit_code -1 = killed by the engine (never exits on its own within the test).
